title: lomandra dura
intro: Lomandra dura, also known as the Mat Rush, is a species of flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its strap-like leaves and yellowish-green flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in indigenous medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lomandra dura include the ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from minor burns and scalds. Herbal preparations of Lomandra dura include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
